findings.blocker: Genuine Mathlib-scale build: the planner's concrete-P route requires a concrete strong-monoidal model of the abstract left-adjoint pullback. Scheme.Modules.pullback f and the underlying PresheafOfModules.pullback φ.hom are BOTH (pushforward _).leftAdjoint — abstract, no sectionwise value. For a general f the concrete left adjoint is (inverse-image presheaf) ⋙ extendScalars, but (a) there is NO PresheafOfModules.extendScalars in Mathlib (only ModuleCat.extendScalars), and (b) the underlying-presheaf inverse image is a left Kan extension (a colimit, not sectionwise) with no concrete Mathlib functor at the pin.
